texto: In high school - that's when I first fell in love with his music and his voice. 'Blonde on Blonde' above everything. I vaguely remember 'Desire' coming out. I definitely remember 'Street Legal' and 'Slow Train Coming.' The first time I saw Dylan was on that tour: '79 in L.A.
explicacao: Citação de Todd Haynes sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “In high school - that's when I first fell in love with his music and his voice. 'Blonde on Blonde…” articula educacao, love, music em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e music.
